prompt: Cinematic, hyper-detailed 4K video scene of absolute chaotic absurdity unfolding on a bustling urban street at dusk: In the foreground, a muscular man named @tortiou5 with the left side of his face dramatically exposed to reveal gleaming metallic Terminator-style endoskeleton plating on his cheek and orbital socket, his left eye a menacing glowing red cybernetic orb pulsing with light. He wears perfectly tailored khaki chinos hugging his form and a snug black tailored tank top featuring the phrase 'WEAPONIZED AUTISM' spelled out in luxuriously ostentatious, ornate, gilded baroque fonts dripping with decorative flourishes and sparkles. This cyborg warrior @tortiou5 is locked in a wild, over-the-top kerfuffle, grappling and shoving against a massive morbidly obese Black woman who is non-bipedal, aggressively crawling and lunging on all fours like a ferocious feral swine. She snorts, squeals, grunts, and charges with dramatic theatrical flair, fully committing to her best wild boar impression in hopes of scoring a breakout star acting role. Both fighters and the entire surrounding crowd are sweating profusely — thick streams of rich red Chianti wine pouring from their pores, soaking clothes and the pavement in boozy crimson rivulets that glisten under streetlights. Gathered spectators flamboyantly sway and thrust their hips in exaggerated, rhythmic dance moves while loudly chanting in unison: 'all monicas from the hood, all monicas keep it hood, and all monicas be thug dumpin!' In the dramatic background sky and cityscape, multiple massive commercial airliners spectacularly collide with towering building facades in glorious fiery explosions of greatness, sending billowing fireballs, twisted metal, and showers of sparks cascading down in slow-motion beauty amid the pandemonium. Dynamic camera work with sweeping pans, dramatic lighting, high energy absurdity, vibrant colors, sweat and wine flying everywhere, perfect synchronization of chaos, comedic violence, and surreal pageantry.
